mapper.select: select Max(PersonnelID) from Bas_Personnel where CompanyID = 'BC'

select * from Bas_Personnel
PersonnelName = #{personnelName} and Mobilephone = #{mobilePhone}
select ShopID, StockID, SportCityID from Bas_Shop where ShopName = #{departmentName} and ShopID is not null and StockID is not null and SportCityID is not null and CompanyID = 'BC'
mapper.insert:
INSERT into Bas_Personnel (CompanyID, PersonnelID, PersonnelCode, PersonnelName, PersonnelTypeID, DepartMentID, Sex, Mobilephone, IsEmployee, IsBuyer, IsPicker, IsSurveyor, IsAssistant, ShopID, AllowUsed, CheckState, LockState, SyncState, ModifyDTM, IsSDCashier, IsEMCashier, IsEMPerson, IsStocker, StockID, IsRecipients, Lan, AllShopName, PersonnelStatus) values
(#{item.companyId}, #{item.personnelId}, #{item.personnelCode}, #{item.personnelName}, #{item.personnelTypeId}, #{item.departmentId}, #{item.sex}, #{item.mobilePhone}, #{item.isEmployee}, #{item.isBuyer}, #{item.isPicker}, #{item.isSurveyor}, #{item.isAssistant}, #{item.shopId}, #{item.allowUsed}, #{item.checkState}, #{item.lockState}, #{item.syncState}, getdate(), #{item.isSdCashier}, #{item.isEmCashier}, #{item.isEmPerson}, #{item.isStocker}, #{item.stockId}, #{item.isRecipients}, #{item.lan}, #{item.allShopName}, #{item.personnelStatus})
mapper.update: UPDATE Bas_Personnel set AllowUsed = 0, ModifyDTM = getdate(), PersonnelStatus = 2 where PersonnelName = #{personnelName} and Mobilephone = #{mobilePhone} and AllowUsed = 1
mapper.select: SELECT PersonnelName, Mobilephone from Bas_Personnel where AllowUsed = 0 and PersonnelStatus = 0 and CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), ModifyDTM, 121) <= CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), getdate() - 30, 121)
select ShopID from bas_shop where ShopName = #{departmentName} and CompanyID = 'BC'
select StockID from Bas_Shop where ShopID = #{shopId} and CompanyID = 'BC' AND AllowUsed = 1
